title: Lurp Legend by Halos1
lyrics: Who, me? No, I didn't take that shit. That's what I got, man. I wouldn't do that. We're friends, man. Like, you're like my best friend. I would never take from you. Come on, man, let's look for it. I'm a Lerp Legend. I'll have you second guessing yourself. I do everything I do in stealth. My happiness dictated by my temporary wealth. I'll teach you all about these broken windows. I'll show you how to twist a fuckin' piece. So, only just once, you'll see. The only person that I ever smoke out is me. I've probably been in your bathroom for centuries. I'm behind your back, Bruce. Improbably. So, function conscious. Weak blood come from me. I'm still found in my body. I'm still in the game. You can't even just kill my gene. I'm a real last ease. I won't even bless you. If you sneeze, bitch, please. Ain't nothing in life comes free. Unless you're rolling with me. Then anything you want could be free. So long as it fits in my pocket. I can't stop this klepto behavior. To the point it's obnoxious. To my haters, fuck a lock switch. I got my lock pickin' set stashed in the mesh of my backpack. Right next to the meth in my backpack. It's an infinite mess in my backpack. That shit is hella dirty. Fuck the hype. My back has no scars at all. That shit's hella good. Cause I'm the one holding the knife. It feels nice to be a Lerp Legend. I could be a Lerp Legend. For you and anyone in your crew. I'm the Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. I'll have you second guessing yourself. I knew everything I knew in stealth. It was my happiness dictated by my temporary wealth. I'll teach you all about these broken windows. I'll show you how to twist the fucking keys. Only just once you see. The only person that I ever spoke out is me. I thought you'd been in your bag for centuries. I'm the Lerp Legend.  I'm the Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. It's a mash of my backpack. Right next to the match in my backpack. It's a definite mess in my backpack. As well as my life. Fuck the hype. My back has no scars at all. That shit's hella clean. Cause I'm the one holding the knife. It feels nice to be a Lerp Legend. I could be a Lerp Lesson. For you or anyone in your crew. Anyone of you. I'm the Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. I'm the Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. Lerp Legend. I swear man I didn't take that. It wasn't me man. I swear to God bro. Come on let me do it. Stop it bro. I finally did it. I told you man. I'm not the Lerp Legend.
